mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bok_settlement_transaction ( settlement_transaction_id, our_payment_instruction_id, direction, counterparty_payment_id, bok_reference_no, sender_bank_clearing_id, receiver_bank_clearing_id, sender_bank_code, sender_account_no_snap, sender_holder_name_snap, receiver_bank_code, receiver_account_no_snap, receiver_holder_name_snap, settlement_amount, currency, settlement_status, reject_code, reject_message, settlement_requested_at, ack_received_at, settled_at, settlement_date, network, last_inquiry_at, inquiry_count, first_registrant_id, last_modifier_id ) VALUES ( #{settlementTransactionId}, #{ourPaymentInstructionId}, #{direction}, #{counterpartyPaymentId}, #{bokReferenceNo}, #{senderBankClearingId}, #{receiverBankClearingId}, #{senderBankCode}, #{senderAccountNoSnap}, #{senderHolderNameSnap}, #{receiverBankCode}, #{receiverAccountNoSnap}, #{receiverHolderNameSnap}, #{settlementAmount}, #{currency}, #{settlementStatus}, #{rejectCode}, #{rejectMessage}, #{settlementRequestedAt}, #{ackReceivedAt}, #{settledAt}, #{settlementDate}, #{network}, #{lastInquiryAt}, #{inquiryCount}, #{firstRegistrantId}, #{lastModifierId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE bok_settlement_transaction SET settlement_status = 'SETTLED', settled_at = #{settledAt}, settlement_date = #{settlementDate}, counterparty_payment_id = NULL, last_modified_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE our_payment_instruction_id = #{piId}

UPDATE bok_settlement_transaction SET settlement_status = 'REJECTED', reject_code = #{rejectCode}, reject_message = #{rejectMessage}, last_modified_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE our_payment_instruction_id = #{piId}
